result.stdout:
Description:
  输入参数请求 url 地址

Usage:
  mmurl <string> [options]

Arguments:
  <string>

Options:
  -H <H>          header,ex: -H "Accept-Language=zh-CN".
  -b <b>          cookie.
  -d <d>          post body.
  -X <X>          GET/POST ... [default: GET]
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  输入参数请求 url 地址

Usage:

Options:

  -b <b>          cookie.
  -d <d>          post body.
  -X <X>          GET/POST ... [default: GET]
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
